description: Sector overlay for retail payment service providers, payment platforms, money services businesses, wallets, remittance, PSP risk management, safeguarding, and AML documentation in Canada.

metadata.scope: Canada-only sector overlay controls for Payment Platforms and Services. Intended to be used with canada_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. Provincial/territorial obligations may apply and are not exhaustively encoded. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

rules.title: Bank of Canada PSP registration evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for RPAA, payment service provider registration, Bank of Canada registration, or retail payment activity evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Bank of Canada retail payments supervision and registration materials

rules.title: Operational-risk management evidence is documented
rules.summary: Checks for risk management, incident response, operational risk, safeguarding operations, or continuity evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Bank of Canada retail payments supervision materials

rules.title: End-user funds safeguarding evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for safeguarding, end-user funds, trust account, segregation, insurance, or protection of funds evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Bank of Canada RPAA supervisory resources

rules.title: FINTRAC MSB registration or AML evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for FINTRAC, MSB/FMSB registration, AML, sanctions, KYC, reporting, or recordkeeping evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: FINTRAC MSB registration and recordkeeping guidance
